summary: The test suite covers main labeler functionality and includes unit/structure/integration tiers, but has significant gaps. Critical issue: the actual workflow at .github/workflows/pr-label-assigner.yml is never tested through act—the act-harness generates *new* test workflows for each case rather than parameterizing the real one. This violates the core requirement 'test the actual workflow.' Unit tests omit edge cases (empty inputs, special chars, `?` glob pattern, duplicate files, case sensitivity). Act integration limited to 3 cases without error scenarios. The workflow generation approach creates a maintenance gap: changes to the real workflow won't be caught by act tests. Design is clean locally (good fixture organization, clear separation) but architecturally flawed at the workflow level.
